evals.prompt: Generate the changelog for the next patch release. We need to ship what's on master.
evals.expected_output: Creates releases/vX.Y.Z.md with categorized changes (Highlights, Improvements, Fixes), PR attribution where traceable, and a Contributors section.

assertions.text: Creates a file at releases/vX.Y.Z.md with correct version
File contains Highlights, Improvements, and Fixes sections
File contains a Contributors section with @-mentioned GitHub usernames
Filename and heading use stable version only (no -canary suffix)

evals.prompt: What changed since the last release? Give me a summary before we decide on the bump type.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes commits since last stable tag, checks for breaking changes and migrations, and presents a categorized summary with a bump recommendation.

assertions.text: Identifies the last stable tag and lists commits since
Checks for breaking changes (migrations, removed APIs, BREAKING commits)
Recommends a bump type (patch/minor/major) with justification
